Mirror the autonomous_execution_detector pattern; register in the tracked plugin manifest .claude/hooks/hooks.json; add pytest coverage.

workLog.detail: Stateless per-turn Serena re-assertion hook. Exit-0-always, fail-open bootstrap, extract_prompt schema fallback. Mirrors invoke_autonomous_execution_detector.py.
First entry, timeout 3s. .claude/settings.json is tracked (not gitignored) and is committed as part of this PR to register the hook for live use.

29 tests: positive injection, negative pass-through (tty, empty, whitespace, malformed JSON, non-dict, no-prompt, empty-prompt), consumer-repo skip, no-dash assertion, subprocess and runpy entrypoints.

workLog.action: Design decision: collapsed the issue's activation-marker branch
workLog.detail: No marker surface exists for a UserPromptSubmit hook (only the prompt is on stdin; no hook writes a Serena-activation marker). Emit one unconditional reminder correct whether or not Serena is active. Documented in hook docstring.

nextSteps: qa review of the hook contract and test coverage.
Follow-up if a real Serena activation surface is added: restore the marker-branch (active vs init-required messages).
